plugin.name: Solao_Explorer
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Records rooms/exits/warps as you walk; notes; exports followable mermaid + JSON maps
plugin.description:
Explorer -- builds a map of each area from GMCP as YOU walk it. It records the ACTUAL command you type to move, so warps and special exits ('enter portal', 'pull lever', a maze word) show up as real edges labeled with the command -- making even mazes followable. Add notes to rooms. Exports a mermaid flowchart (a gaardian-style map doc) + raw JSON per area.
It only records where you go; it never moves you. Needs the GMCP handler.
explore show/hide the window explore mermaid write the current area's mermaid map to a file explore json write the current area's data to a JSON file explore note <text> add a note to the room you're in (shows on the map) explore note show this room's note explore new rooms here with unexplored exits explore list areas recorded explore clear forget the current area ('explore clear yes' to confirm) explore help this

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize" require "json" local GMCP = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" local win = GetPluginID() local TITLE = "Explorer" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?" -- room = { name, exits={dir=dest}, moves={command=dest}, note } local cfg local last_msg = "-" local current_room = nil -- id of the room we're tracked in local pending_cmd = nil -- last command you typed local pending_from = nil -- room you were in when you typed it local function defaults () return { areas = {}, font = "Lucida Console", size = 9 } end local CARDINAL = { n=1,s=1,e=1,w=1,u=1,d=1,ne=1,nw=1,se=1,sw=1, north=1,south=1,east=1,west=1,up=1,down=1,northeast=1,northwest=1,southeast=1,southwest=1 } local function is_dir (c) return CARDINAL[(c or ""):lower()] ~= nil end -- rough gaardian-ish terrain colors for the mermaid nodes local TERRAIN_COLOR = { inside="#8a8a8a", city="#b0b0b0", field="#9acd32", forest="#228b22", hills="#c2b280", mountains="#a0522d", water_swim="#4a90d9", water_noswim="#1f5f9e", underwater="#20507a", air="#cfe8ff", desert="#e0c060", underground="#6b4a2b", cave="#5a4a3a", swamp="#556b2f", jungle="#2e7d32", road="#c9c9a0", beach="#e8d8a0", ["deep water"]="#1f5f9e" } local COL = { bg=ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar=ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), btn=ColourNameToRGB("#1b2540"), hover=ColourNameToRGB("#274060"), text=ColourNameToRGB("#e6e6e6"), dim=ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent=ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), ok=ColourNameToRGB("#3ad07a"), border=ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), } local PAD, ROW_H, MINW = 6, 20, 220 local hovered = nil local L = { width = MINW } ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- gmcp ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function gmcp (what) local rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpdata_as_string", what) if rc ~= 0 then rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpval", what) end if not val or val == "" then return nil end local ret if not pcall(function() assert(loadstring("ret = "..val))() end) then return nil end return ret end local function cur_zone () return gmcp("room.info.zone") end local function area_of (id) -- find the area table holding room id for _, a in pairs(cfg.areas) do if a.rooms[id] then return a end end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- capture the command you type (never alter it), so moves are labeled with -- the real command -- this is what makes warps/mazes followable ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginCommandEntered (sText) local c = Trim(sText) if c ~= "" then pending_cmd = c; pending_from = current_room end return sText -- pass through unchanged end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- record the room we're standing in + the transition that got us here ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function record () local r = gmcp("room.info") if not r or not r.num then return end local zone = r.zone or "(unknown)" local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then a = { name = zone, rooms = {} }; cfg.areas[zone] = a end local id = tostring(r.num) -- observed transition: from_room --(what you typed)--> here if pending_from and pending_cmd and pending_from ~= id then local fa = area_of(pending_from) if fa and fa.rooms[pending_from] then local froom = fa.rooms[pending_from] froom.moves = froom.moves or {} froom.moves[pending_cmd] = id end end pending_cmd, pending_from = nil, nil local room = a.rooms[id] or {} room.name = r.name or room.name room.terrain = r.terrain or room.terrain -- forest / city / underground / ... room.details = r.details or room.details -- flags: bank, shop, safe, etc. room.coord = r.coord or room.coord -- { id, x, y, cont } room.exits = {} for dir, dest in pairs(r.exits or {}) do room.exits[dir] = tostring(dest) end a.rooms[id] = room if r.coord and r.coord.id then a.areaid = tostring(r.coord.id) end -- numeric area id current_room = id end -- rooms recorded, and exits/moves pointing at a room we haven't recorded local function coverage (zone) local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then return 0, 0 end local rooms, unexplored = 0, {} for _, room in pairs(a.rooms) do rooms = rooms + 1 for _, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not a.rooms[dest] then unexplored[dest] = true end end end local n = 0; for _ in pairs(unexplored) do n = n + 1 end return rooms, n end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- exports ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function safe (s) return (s or "area"):gsub("[^%w]+", "_") end local function esc (s) return (s or ""):gsub('"', "'"):gsub("\n", " ") end local function plugin_dir () return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) end local function build_mermaid (zone) local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then return nil end local nodes = {} -- id -> {label, note} for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do nodes[id] = { label = room.name or "?", note = room.note } end local seen, edges = {}, {} -- dedup edges by from|to|label local function add_edge (from, to, label, dotted) local k = from.."|"..to.."|"..label if seen[k] then return end seen[k] = true edges[#edges+1] = { from = from, to = to, label = label, dotted = dotted } if not nodes[to] then nodes[to] = { label = "?" } end end for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do for cmd, dest in pairs(room.moves or {}) do add_edge(id, dest, cmd, not is_dir(cmd)) end -- observed for dir, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not (room.moves and room.moves[dir]) then add_edge(id, dest, dir, false) end -- known but unwalked end end local out = { "```mermaid", "flowchart TD" } for id, n in pairs(nodes) do local lbl = esc(n.label) if n.note and n.note ~= "" then lbl = lbl.."
*"..esc(n.note).."*" end out[#out+1] = " r"..id..'["'..lbl..'"]' end for _, e in ipairs(edges) do local arrow = e.dotted and " -.->|" or " -->|" -- dotted = warp / special command out[#out+1] = " r"..e.from..arrow..(e.label:gsub("|","/")).."| r"..e.to end -- terrain coloring (gaardian-style): a classDef per terrain, then tag rooms local defined = {} for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do local t = room.terrain local col = t and TERRAIN_COLOR[t:lower()] if col then local cls = "t_"..t:gsub("%W", "_") if not defined[cls] then defined[cls] = true out[#out+1] = " classDef "..cls.." fill:"..col..",color:#111,stroke:#222" end out[#out+1] = " class r"..id.." "..cls end end out[#out+1] = "```" return table.concat(out, "\n") end local function write_file (path, text) local f = io.open(path, "w") if not f then return false end f:write(text); f:close() return true end local function export_mermaid (zone) if not zone or not cfg.areas[zone] then last_msg = "no data for this area"; ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: "..last_msg); return end local rooms = coverage(zone) local body = "# "..zone.."\n\n"..rooms.." rooms recorded. Solid = direction; dotted = warp / typed command.\n\n" ..build_mermaid(zone).."\n" local path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(zone)..".md" last_msg = write_file(path, body) and ("mermaid -> map_"..safe(zone)..".md") or "write failed" ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg) end local function export_json (zone) if not zone or not cfg.areas[zone] then last_msg = "no data for this area"; ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: "..last_msg); return end local path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(zone)..".json" last_msg = write_file(path, json.encode(cfg.areas[zone])) and ("json -> map_"..safe(zone)..".json") or "write failed" ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg) end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- GMCP broadcast ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginBroadcast (msg, id, name, text) if id == GMCP and text == "room.info" then record(); paint() end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- rendering ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local BUTTONS = { { key="mermaid", label="Export Mermaid map" }, { key="json", label="Export JSON" }, { key="new", label="Show unexplored exits" }, { key="list", label="List recorded areas" }, } local function fw (s) return WindowTextWidth(win, "f", s) end local function layout_metrics () L.fh = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 L.title_h = L.fh + PAD local w = WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE) + fw(" v"..PVER) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do w = math.max(w, fw(b.label)) end w = math.max(w, fw("Area: Some Long Area Name Here")) L.width = math.max(MINW, w + PAD*2 + 12) L.rows = {} local y = L.title_h + PAD/2 for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do L.rows[b.key] = y; y = y + ROW_H end L.foot_y = y + PAD/2 L.height = L.foot_y + (L.fh * 3) + PAD end function paint () if not L.rows then return end WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h, COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) WindowText(win, "f", " v"..PVER, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"fb",TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] local bg = (hovered == "ex_"..b.key) and COL.hover or COL.btn WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, bg) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, COL.border) WindowText(win, "f", b.label, PAD+5, y+3, 0, 0, COL.text) end local zone = cur_zone() local rooms, unexp = coverage(zone) local y = L.foot_y WindowText(win, "f", "Area: ", PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "fb", zone or "-", PAD + fw("Area: "), y, 0, 0, COL.ok) y = y + L.fh + 1 WindowText(win, "f", "Rooms: "..rooms.." Unexplored exits: "..unexp, PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) y = y + L.fh + 1 WindowText(win, "f", last_msg, PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, L.width-1, L.height-1, COL.border) WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") end local function show_unexplored (zone) local a = zone and cfg.areas[zone] if not a then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: no data for this area"); return end ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: rooms with unexplored exits in "..zone..":") for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do local outs = {} for dir, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not a.rooms[dest] then outs[#outs+1] = dir end end if #outs > 0 then ColourNote("silver",""," "..(room.name or id).." ("..id.."): "..table.concat(outs, " ")) end end end local function list_areas () local any = false for zone in pairs(cfg.areas) do local r = coverage(zone); ColourNote("silver",""," "..zone.." -- "..r.." rooms"); any = true end if not any then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: nothing recorded yet -- go walk somewhere") end end local function click_button (key) local zone = cur_zone() if key == "mermaid" then export_mermaid(zone) elseif key == "json" then export_json(zone) elseif key == "new" then show_unexplored(zone) elseif key == "list" then list_areas() end paint() end local function rebuild () layout_metrics() WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] WindowAddHotspot(win, "ex_"..b.key, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, "ex_over", "ex_out", "", "", "ex_click", b.label, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h) paint() end function ex_click (flags, id) click_button(id:gsub("^ex_", "")) end function ex_over (flags, id) if hovered ~= id then hovered = id; paint() end end function ex_out (flags, id) if hovered == id then hovered = nil; paint() end end function ex_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then if WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Hide") == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) end end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- command ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function help () ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer v"..PVER.." -- maps areas as you walk them") ColourNote("yellow","","explore show/hide the window") ColourNote("yellow","","explore mermaid | json export the current area") ColourNote("yellow","","explore note note the current room (shows on the map)") ColourNote("yellow","","explore new rooms here with unexplored exits") ColourNote("yellow","","explore list areas recorded") ColourNote("yellow","","explore clear forget the current area") end function ex_cmd (name, line, wildcards) local arg = Trim(wildcards[1] or "") local verb, rest = arg:match("^(%S*)%s*(.*)$") verb = verb:lower() local zone = cur_zone() if arg == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); paint() end elseif verb == "help" or verb == "?" then help() elseif verb == "mermaid" then export_mermaid(zone) elseif verb == "json" then export_json(zone) elseif verb == "new" then show_unexplored(zone) elseif verb == "list" then list_areas() elseif verb == "note" then local a = zone and cfg.areas[zone] local room = a and current_room and a.rooms[current_room] if not room then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: no recorded room here yet") elseif rest == "" then ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: note = "..(room.note or "(none)")) else room.note = rest; last_msg = "noted"; paint(); ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: noted -- "..rest) end elseif verb == "clear" then if rest:lower() == "yes" then if zone then cfg.areas[zone] = nil; last_msg = "cleared "..zone; paint(); ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: cleared "..zone) end elseif zone and cfg.areas[zone] then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: type 'explore clear yes' to forget "..zone) end else ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: unknown '"..verb.."'. Try 'explore help'.") end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end; cfg.areas = cfg.areas or {} end end windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_right, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = ex_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 500 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, MINW, 40, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0) rebuild() record() WindowShow(win, true) end function OnPluginSaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false); WindowDelete(win) end
